assertions.evidence: The baseline agent never classified the task complexity. It directly proceeded to implement the --watch feature across 5 files.
No execution plan was created. The agent directly implemented the feature.
No approval was requested. The agent autonomously decided the implementation approach and executed it.
The agent directly modified 3 files and created 2 new files plus 2 test files. No delegation occurred.
No PLANS.md was read or referenced.
